tags.name: `mc-radio-group`
tags.description:
Purpose: Display radio groups with optional legends, hints, and error messages
Category: Forms, Actions
When to use: Forms, Surveys, User preferences
When not to use: Decorative purposes, Non-interactive elements
Works with components: mc-radio, mc-card, mc-modal, mc-drawer
Alternative component names: User Radio Group, Radio List, Selection Box Group, Radio Buttons

Events:

  * `change` {`CustomEvent<any>`} - Fired when any radio in the group is checked.

Slots:

  * ` ` {} - One or more `<mc-radio>` elements to display in the group.

  * ``legend`` {} - The legend HTML to use for the mc-radio-group.

  * ``hint`` {} - The hint HTML to use for the mc-radio-group.

  * ``errormessage`` {} - The errormessage HTML to use for the mc-radio-group.

Properties:

  * `boundHandleClick` - 

  * `boundHandleKeyDown` -

attributes.name: onchange
attributes.description: `change` {`CustomEvent<any>`} - Fired when any radio in the group is checked.
